Lots ofconnectives
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Logic]]In lecture (9/7/2022)
#Conjunction<ref>Logical conjunction. (2022, May 1). In ''Wikipedia''. <nowiki>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Logical_conjunction</nowiki></ref>
#Dysjunction (or)
#implication
#equivalence
#negation (written as ' prime in this class)
==9/9==
A well formed formula is a formula that is valid in symbolic logic

~A^A is a well formed formula despite being a contradiction

The main connective is the last connective which is applied in a formula

Definitions are [[proofs by tautology]]
==See Also==

* [[set theory]]

==References==
<references />
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
